Legal

Returns & Refund Policy

Returns are accepted within 7 days of delivery for unused items with original tags and packaging intact.

To request a return, contact hello@antariyaofficial.com with your order ID and reason for return.

Once the returned product passes quality inspection, refunds are processed to the original payment method within 5-7 business days.

Shipping charges, if any, are non-refundable unless the return is due to a damaged or incorrect item.

Size exchanges are supported subject to stock availability.
